label: Instrument & Account
description: Instrument selector, account picker, live bid/ask price, and quick-action buttons for the active terminal.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx.

0.6.note: isLoading guard renders loading spinner via TerminalData context.

0.7.note: Instrument/account selectors loop safely over empty arrays; no explicit empty-guard UI but functionally safe (context guarantees default instrument).

0.8.note: error guard renders rose-400 error text.

0.9.note: No dead code or commented-out blocks.

l0.notes: All L0 checks pass or partial (0.7 functionally safe). No fixes required this pass.

1.2.note: use-terminal-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() and reads context.mode, context.strategyIds.

1.3.note: Control-bar drives scope selection; no org-filtered tabular data.

1.5.note: context.strategyIds auto-selects matching instrument via strategyInstruments map.

1.6.note: Control-bar widget; empty scope arrays do not change display.

1.7.note: Default instrument list lives in use-terminal-page-data.ts (not lib/mocks).

l1.notes: L1 pass. 1.3/1.4/1.6 legitimately N/A for a control-bar widget.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab ({domain,tier} entitlements, 17 register.ts files, 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ (LIVE badge shown), batch ✓ (BATCH badge shown), paper N/A (not yet exposed in UI toggle).

3.2.note: use-terminal-page-data.ts reads context.mode; isBatchMode=context.mode==='batch' flows through TerminalData to widget.

3.5.note: Paper mode expected behavior: same UI as live; no order submission (same as batch guard); badge would show PAPER. Not yet wired in toggle.

3.6.note: WebSocket enabled only when context.mode==='live' (useWebSocket enabled:context.mode==='live' in use-terminal-page-data.ts line 301); 500ms sim interval always runs but is mock-data-only so no live data risk.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3/3.4 required: toggle to batch → instrument bar should still render normally (no order submission available in this widget). Batch indicator badge shows correctly.

4.1.note: RefreshCw, Settings, and Maximize2 buttons at lines 132–140 have no onClick handler — dead buttons. Filed as L4 finding.

4.5.note: No gated page links in this widget.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: Agent checks 4.1(fail)/4.2/4.5/4.6 done. 4.1 has dead buttons — flagged but NOT fixed this pass (requires product decision on intended action). Human checks 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 required.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all strategy types in STRATEGIES registry — widget provides instrument selection that feeds into any strategy. Acts as the universal instrument/account picker, not strategy-specific. Strategies: basis-trade, recursive-staked-basis, amm-lp, lending-arb, liquidation-monitor, momentum, mean-reversion.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 follows L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors in widget file. CLEAN.

7.3.note: 144 lines — within 500-line limit. No function >200 lines.

7.4.note: Component PascalCase (InstrumentBarWidget), hook useCamelCase (useTerminalData), file kebab-case (instrument-bar-widget.tsx). CLEAN.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, innerHTML=. CLEAN.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file. CLEAN.

l7.notes: L7 pass. 7.5 globally deferred pending i18n. All other checks clean.

8.1.note: text-[10px] → text-micro at lines 66, 108, 116, 122. --text-micro (0.625rem) now available in globals.css @theme.

8.2.note: No arbitrary spacing values (p-[…], m-[…], gap-[…]). CLEAN.

8.3.note: Uses Select, Badge, Button from components/ui/*. No unwarranted custom div+tailwind replacements.

8.4.note: Agent: no

8.5.note: Human check required — responsive at minW=4, minH=1.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (--text-micro applied). 8.2/8.3/8.4(agent) pass. 8.4(human) + 8.5 require human walkthrough.

keepSeparate.rationale: Instrument bar is a singleton control-bar — all terminal widgets depend on its instrument/account selection. Merging into any detail widget would break the master→detail topology.

relationships.notes: Acts as the master selector for the entire terminal tab. selectedInstrument propagates to all other terminal widgets via TerminalDataContext.

dataContract.mockSource: use-terminal-page-data.ts DEFAULT_INSTRUMENTS constant + 500ms mock price tick interval
dataContract.notes: WS connects to ws://localhost:8030/ws for live price ticks. REST fallback via useTickers(). 500ms mock sim interval runs in mock-data mode only.

gaps: DeFi instruments not yet in DEFAULT_INSTRUMENTS list (ETH-based DeFi protocols not represented)
coverage.notes: Widget serves all strategies/venues by virtue of being the instrument selector. DeFi instruments would need to be surfaced in the instruments list from the API.

knownIssues: RefreshCw, Settings, Maximize2 buttons have no onClick handlers — dead buttons pending product spec (L4.1)
DEFAULT_INSTRUMENTS list is CeFi-only; DeFi/TradFi instruments depend on API data

findings.description: instrument-bar-widget.tsx:132-140 — RefreshCw, Settings, and Maximize2 icon buttons render with no onClick handler (dead buttons)
findings.deferReason: Requires product decision on intended action (refresh data, open settings panel, fullscreen). Flagged for human review at L4.

findings.description: instrument-bar-widget.tsx — ~8 user-visible strings not wrapped in i18n (Loading..., LIVE, BATCH, Select account, etc.)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: instrument-bar-widget.tsx:66,108,116,122 — text-[10px] arbitrary typography class used; no matching token in globals.css @theme scale
findings.deferReason: missing token — requests --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) in globals.css for dense trading UI sub-label text
findings.fix: globals.css @theme now exposes --text-micro (0.625rem); widget updated to text-micro at lines 66, 108, 116, 122.
